summary.text:
The task is to search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain — agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. Date range: 2026-07-08 to 2026-07-09. Retur...First, the date range is 2026-07-08 to 2026-07-09. Since the current date is around July 2026, this is very recent, basically yesterday and today if today is 07-09.

I need to use tools.

output.input: {"query":"(\"AI agent\" OR \"AI agents\") (onchain OR blockchain OR crypto OR web3) (payment OR payments OR bounty OR bounties OR oracle OR oracles) since:2026-07-08 until:2026-07-09","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

output.input: {"query":"(\"agent payments\" OR \"AI-judged bounties\" OR \"decentralized AI oracles\" OR \"AI agents\" onchain) since:2026-07-08 until:2026-07-09","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

output.input: {"query":"AI agents that transact onchain, agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles","limit":"10","from_date":"2026-07-08","to_date":"2026-07-09"}
output.name: x_semantic_search

content.text:
**Here are 10 high-signal posts** (prioritizing launches, releases, verifiable demos, standards, and concrete infrastructure details over opinions):

1. **@Bunz_web3**  
   Full text: As Ai agents become capable of handling payments, APIs, and real financial operations, giving them unlimited access is becoming one of the biggest security risks. That is where Latch comes in. Instead of handing an agent your master credentials, Latch introduces a governance layer that lets you define exactly what an Ai agent is allowed to do you can limit spending, control permissions, bind access to specific hardware, and receive a verifiable log of every action the agent performs. This transforms delegation from blind trust into controlled execution. With Latch, developers and organizations can confidently deploy Ai agents while maintaining security, compliance, and full visibility over every operation. It is another step toward the infrastructure needed for the next generation of Ai powered finance, and another example of how the @RialoHQ ecosystem is building practical tools rather than just talking about the future.  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 23:13:58 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=2, retweets=0, replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/Bunz_web3/status/2074995437258383594

2. **@afro_v1**  
   Full text: 4/6 meet x402 a payment standard that lets AI agents pay for data, APIs and services instantly in USDC no API keys. no subscriptions. no human approving anything need premium market data? pay for exactly that one request and move on under a second. fully onchain.  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 23:00:12 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=2, retweets=0, replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/afro_v1/status/2074991972754784466

3. **@blckchaindaily**  
   Full text: 🚨 ARBITRUM ADDS AGENTIC PAYMENT PATHWAYS VIA COINBASE HOSTED FACILITATOR AND OFFCHAIN MPP, TARGETING AI AGENT FINANCE $ARB $COIN  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 19:03:50 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=1, retweets=0, replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/blckchaindaily/status/2074932489420710145

4. **@CryptoEconomyEN**  
   Full text: 🤖 0G is bringing Alibaba Cloud’s Qwen models onchain to give AI agents direct access to advanced intelligence through tokenized infrastructure. The collaboration introduces a new access model where agents can interact with Qwen without traditional accounts, fiat payments or manual configuration. Instead, access is managed through token-based infrastructure designed for autonomous systems. According to @0G_labs, Qwen provides the intelligence layer while its network adds verification and trust mechanisms for agent execution. The shift reflects a broader race to build AI infrastructure for autonomous software, where agents need more than models: they need reliable access, verifiable execution and scalable workflows. The key challenge now is turning onchain model access into applications that deliver real-world value.  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 18:30:40 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=1, retweets=0, replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/CryptoEconomyEN/status/2074924140998316540

5. **@phulimphad**  
   Full text: built an AI bounty judge on @ritualfnd: set a task + prize → players submit → an LLM reads every answer in the chain's TEE, picks the winner, pays out in one tx. no human referee. no oracle. the verdict is a computation you verify — not a claim. https://ai-bounty-judge.vercel.app/  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 13:58:01 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=3, retweets=0, replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/phulimphad/status/2074855530129129909

6. **@Lid_onchain**  
   Full text: AI agents are changing how value is created. Now it's time to change how value is settled. Proud to be a launch partner for @Voightxyz, providing the on-chain settlement that enables AI-driven transactions to instantly distribute payments to every participant in a single transaction. As autonomous commerce evolves, settlement becomes the infrastructure that makes it all possible. Voight powers the agents. Lid powers the payments. Together, we power the next agentic era!  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 17:17:06 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=61, retweets=18, replies=17  
   Link: https://x.com/Lid_onchain/status/2074905628448063868

7. **@bennyhoneypot**  
   Full text: Agents that can pay for compute, data & services on demand with budgets enforced in code before any x402 payment leaves the wallet. @OpenCovenant + @CircuitLLM = real agentic commerce. Not promises. Enforced spend. $CVNT  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 08:48:54 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=18, retweets=9, replies=7  
   Link: https://x.com/bennyhoneypot/status/2074777736816505261

8. **@zenonchain**  
   Full text: spent the last week building an AI trading agent on BOT Chain, then spent the next few days trying to break it. kept feeding it prompt injections, poisoned instructions, and malicious goals. it never once approved a bad transaction. so i built Warden — a simple on-chain policy firewall for agents. the agent (gemini 2.5 flash) can only propose actions as JSON. it never touches keys. everything has to go through screenAndExecute on WardenGuard.sol. the contract checks against a few rules before anything moves: • spend caps + daily limits • token & destination allowlists • chain lock + cooldown • slippage • and injection tripwire big detail i’m actually proud of: when something violates the rules, it doesn’t revert. it emits a Decision(allowed=false, reason) event and just does nothing. you still get the full audit trail on-chain instead of losing the log. live on @BOTChain_ai testnet (chain 968). you can see the real blocked txs on the explorer. code:  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 05:50:35 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=35, retweets=13, replies=6  
   Link: https://x.com/zenonchain/status/2074732863384121493

9. **@rohankanojia_in**  
   Full text: . @SkaleNetwork , built for the agent economy: > Years of gasless, high throughput infra, now paying off > Zero fees + sub second finality, exactly what AI agents need > Programmable privacy, not bolted on > Expansion onto Base > Steady stream of agent focused launches This isn't a chain chasing a narrative. It's infra that was ready when the narrative showed up. Six projects worth tracking: @heyaura: AI wallet assistant. Finds yield, preps swaps, executes with your OK. Zero gas the whole way. @thoughtproof_ai: verifies agent decisions are fact grounded, not hallucinated. Two production APIs, live since June 2026. Lyneth: on chain reputation for agents (ERC-8004). Know who to trust, backed by a real track record. x402: agents pay per API call, per GPU minute, or per article. Cents, not subscriptions. AgentOracle and AgentTech: newer tooling from SKALE's latest Developer Showcase. Still early. SKALE, built for agents that transact nonstop, not humans clicking once in a while.  
   Date posted: 2026-07-08 14:17:02 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=2, retweets=1, replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/rohankanojia_in/status/2074860314248544380

10. **@BareseEnzio**  
    Full text: Pieverse IO's new listing allows for instant and gasless payments between AI agents, machines, and users, supporting a variety of Web3 use cases with speed and efficiency  
    Date posted: 2026-07-08 22:48:23 GMT  
    Engagement: likes=0, retweets=0, replies=0  
    Link: https://x.com/BareseEnzio/status/2074988999715012703
